sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 36:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 36:1
items.html: The coarsest phase in the screen is its anterior side, and the phase that is not so coarse is the posterior in it. (Inner Light, Item 15)
